name: Streptococcus sensor (CSP/ComD + CRISPRa)
shortDescription: Detects Streptococcus via its competence-stimulating peptide (CSP). The ComD/ComE quorum system gates a CRISPRa circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in the food-grade Gram-positive chassis Lactococcus lactis.

input.detects: The CSP quorum peptide secreted by streptococci (e.g. S. pneumoniae, S. mutans)

sensing.sensorMechanism: The ComD histidine kinase detects CSP and phosphorylates ComE, which activates competence promoters (PcomX/PcomC).
sensing.signalFlow: CSP -> ComD/ComE activates a com promoter -> transcribes an sgRNA -> dCas9-activator amplifies a fluorescent reporter (CRISPRa) -> fluorescence when Streptococcus signal is present.

parts.name: ComD/ComE two-component system
parts.notes: CSP-responsive sensor kinase + activator; Gram-positive peptide signalling fits L. lactis.

parts.name: Reporter-activating sgRNA
parts.source: designed for CRISPRa upstream of a weak reporter promoter

output.result: Fluorescence indicates streptococcal CSP in the sample.

performance.notes: Senses the pathogen's peptide signal, not the live organism; ComD/ComE and CRISPRa are validated separately and integration is a design template (requires porting com into L. lactis).

safety.biocontainment: Safe GRAS L. lactis reads a secreted peptide; no streptococcal culture required.

buildSteps.title: Port com + design sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Reconstitute ComD/ComE in L. lactis; design the CRISPRa sgRNA.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: ComD/ComE. TU2: PcomX -> sgRNA. TU3: dCas9-omega. TU4: weak promoter -> mCherry. NICE vectors.

buildSteps.title: Transform L. lactis MG1363
buildSteps.description: Electroporate; select; add thyA containment; validate CSP response.

buildSteps.title: Add sample
buildSteps.description: Incubate with the sample + synthetic CSP standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining the Streptococcus ComD/CSP quorum module with L. lactis CRISPRa
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
